name: Walk-Behind Floor Scrubber BC500 — Lithium Battery
keywords: walk behind floor scrubber, battery floor scrubber, small floor scrubber, industrial floor cleaning machine, walk behind scrubber dryer, lithium floor scrubber, compact floor scrubber, floor scrubber for small warehouse, commercial floor scrubber
description:
The BIOCCE BC500 Walk-Behind Floor Scrubber is a compact, high-performance cleaning machine designed for warehouses, retail stores, schools, and commercial facilities up to 10,000 m². Powered by a standard lithium battery, it delivers stable runtime and zero maintenance compared to lead-acid alternatives. The integrated scrubbing, washing, and vacuuming system achieves streak-free, bone-dry floors in a single pass.

With a 500mm cleaning width and 2000 m²/h productivity, the BC500 replaces up to 4 workers with mops and buckets. The 55L solution tank and 60L recovery tank reduce refill frequency, while the compact body navigates narrow aisles, doorways, and elevator access with ease. The rotomolded body provides industrial-grade durability, and the ergonomic handle ensures comfortable all-day operation.

Ideal buyers: Facility managers, warehouse supervisors, school maintenance teams, retail store owners looking for an affordable, reliable entry-level floor scrubber.

name: Ride-on Floor Scrubber BC600 — Compact Lithium Model
keywords: ride on floor scrubber, small ride on scrubber, industrial scrubber dryer, battery floor scrubber ride on, compact ride on floor cleaning machine, warehouse floor scrubber, factory floor scrubber, lithium ride on scrubber, automatic floor scrubber machine, floor cleaning machine for factory
description:
The BIOCCE BC600 Ride-on Floor Scrubber is the economical choice for facilities seeking to upgrade from walk-behind models. With a compact design and 1m turning radius, it navigates tight spaces while delivering 3360 m²/h cleaning capacity — nearly double a walk-behind machine.

The BC600 integrates scrubbing, washing, and waxing in one pass. Powered by a 100Ah lithium battery and permanent magnet brushless hub motor, it offers low noise operation (ideal for retail and hospitality environments) and zero battery maintenance. The 55L solution tank and 58L recovery tank support extended cleaning sessions, while the semi-automatic brush loading system enhances operator safety.

Ideal for: Medium-sized warehouses, supermarkets, hotels, schools, parking garages, and production workshops up to 15,000 m².

name: Ride-on Floor Scrubber BC1000 — Dual Brush, High Capacity
keywords: large ride on floor scrubber, industrial floor scrubber machine, dual brush scrubber, factory floor cleaning machine, heavy duty floor scrubber, warehouse cleaning equipment, automatic ride on scrubber, high capacity floor scrubber, lithium battery scrubber, floor cleaning machine for large warehouse
description:
The BIOCCE BC1000 is a high-capacity ride-on floor scrubber featuring a dual 19-inch brush deck with 1000mm total scrubbing width. Designed for large facilities, it achieves up to 6000 m²/h productivity — replacing teams of manual cleaners and drastically reducing labor costs.

The standard lithium battery and permanent magnet brushless motor provide reliable all-day performance. Large 80L solution and 85L recovery tanks minimize refill stops. Automotive-grade design principles ensure operator comfort during extended shifts, with an ergonomic wrap-around seat, one-button brush loading, and intuitive controls. The compact frame fits standard elevators, enabling multi-floor cleaning in commercial buildings.

Ideal for: Large warehouses, logistics centers, airports, shopping malls, convention centers, and manufacturing plants up to 30,000 m².

name: Ride-on Floor Scrubber BC1250 — Heavy Duty, Extra Wide
keywords: heavy duty ride on floor scrubber, industrial floor scrubber, large floor cleaning machine, warehouse scrubber, factory floor scrubber machine, dual brush ride on scrubber, 1066mm scrubber, high productivity floor scrubber, lithium battery scrubber 150ah, industrial cleaning equipment supplier, extra wide floor scrubber
description:
The BIOCCE BC1250 is our flagship heavy-duty ride-on floor scrubber, engineered for the largest industrial facilities. Featuring a 21-inch dual brush deck with 1066mm scrubbing width and 6600 m²/h productivity, it cleans vast areas faster than any comparable machine in its class.

Powered by a 150Ah lithium battery, the BC1250 achieves up to 35,000 m² per charge — ideal for multi-shift operations. The PMSM hub motor reduces machine weight by 35% compared to competitors, while the dual rear-wheel silent drive delivers powerful yet quiet operation. The full 360° anti-collision design and low center of gravity ensure safety in busy industrial environments. Dual scrub brushes paired with a 1280mm curved squeegee leave floors perfectly dry.

Ideal for: Large logistics hubs, distribution centers, airports, automotive factories, food processing plants, and any facility over 30,000 m² requiring maximum cleaning productivity.
